betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Welded Osmiridium Plate§f is the processed form of §bOsmiridium§f for structural applications.

§eUses:§f
• High-end machinery construction
• Components requiring exceptional strength
• End-game structural elements

§eCrafting:§f
• Made on high-tier anvils
• Requires Osmiridium ingots

§aTip:§f These plates are essential for the most demanding structural applications in end-game machinery.
